note: ⚠️ Walt Disney Imagineering recently filed permits for new signage at Aloha Isle — no closure confirmed, but worth checking day-of if it's your main stop.

items.name: Aloha Isle
items.location: Adventureland, next to the Enchanted Tiki Room / Magic Carpets of Aladdin
items.desc: The original spot. Pineapple, vanilla swirl, Pineapple Float, Pineapple Upside-Down Cake. Mobile order often disabled — plan to walk up.

items.name: Sunshine Tree Terrace
items.desc: Orange, sometimes Strawberry, plus floats. Mobile order usually works here — good backup if Aloha Isle's line is long.

items.name: Refreshment Outpost
items.location: World Showcase, between China and Germany

items.name: Swirled Showcase
items.location: Near Port of Entry, World Celebration/World Showcase
items.desc: Rotating swirl flavors — changes with whichever festival is running.

items.name: Tamu Tamu Refreshments
items.desc: Pineapple. Reviewers consistently flag this as the weakest location resort-wide — melts faster, less fresh-tasting than other spots.

items.name: No dedicated location
items.desc: The one park without a classic Dole Whip stand as of this writing.

items.name: Swirls on the Water
items.desc: Deepest flavor bench anywhere on property: Pineapple, Vanilla, Strawberry, Raspberry, Lime, Lemon, Peach, Watermelon, Mango. Offers a 3-flavor Flight, a Sampler, Dark Chocolate Cone, and rotating seasonal sundaes.

items.name: Wine Bar George
items.desc: Frozcato — a Dole Whip-based boozy specialty.

items.name: Snack Shack
items.desc: Pineapple, Strawberry, Vanilla, and Green Matcha tea. Both alcoholic and non-alcoholic versions.

items.name: Pineapple Lanai
items.location: Disney's Polynesian Village Resort, near the lobby beneath 'Ohana
items.desc: Classic pineapple. Barefoot Pool Bar and Oasis Pool Bar (also at the Poly) do boozy versions.

items.name: Fuel
items.desc: 6-flavor frozen yogurt/Dole Whip bar: Pineapple, Chocolate, Vanilla, Strawberry, New York Cheesecake, Caramel Corn — mix 1-2 flavors with 10 toppings.
